_instructions.purpose: Seed data for Forcepoint as a real demo company in the agent-sales-bot.
_instructions.how_to_use: Scrape forcepoint.com and fill every field marked with '>>> SCRAPE:'.
_instructions.after_filling: Pass this JSON to seed_forcepoint() in init_db.py or POST to /api/v1/admin/companies.

name: Forcepoint
one_line_value: >>> SCRAPE: Hero headline from forcepoint.com homepage — 1 sentence, the core value prop.

brand_voice.style: >>> SCRAPE: Tone from website copy — e.g. 'authoritative, expert, direct — enterprise-grade'
brand_voice.avoid: >>> SCRAPE: Any tone/topics explicitly avoided in their copy

icp.company_size: >>> SCRAPE: Target org size from 'who we serve' / solution pages — e.g. '1,000+ employees'
industries: >>> SCRAPE: verticals listed on /industries page — e.g. 'Government', 'Financial Services', 'Healthcare'
buyer_roles: >>> SCRAPE: add any roles mentioned in case studies
icp.pain_trigger: >>> SCRAPE: The triggering event described in their messaging — e.g. 'data breach, compliance mandate, insider threat incident'

pain_points: >>> SCRAPE: Pain point 1 from /solutions or /why-forcepoint page
>>> SCRAPE: Pain point 5 — keep to 5-7 max

products.name: >>> SCRAPE: Exact product name from /products page
products.summary: >>> SCRAPE: One-line product summary from product card or hero
products.details: >>> SCRAPE: Full product description — key capabilities, what it protects, integrations
products.addons: >>> SCRAPE: Add-ons or modules listed on the product page

products.name: >>> SCRAPE: Exact product name (CASB / SSE / SASE if listed)
>>> SCRAPE: Exact product name for insider threat / behavioral analytics

differentiators: >>> SCRAPE: Differentiator 1 from /why-forcepoint or competitive comparison pages
>>> SCRAPE: Differentiator 4 — keep to 4-6 bullet points

faq_kb_refs.q: What compliance standards does Forcepoint support?
faq_kb_refs.a: >>> SCRAPE: Pull from /compliance or trust/certifications page — GDPR, HIPAA, FedRAMP, SOC 2, etc.

faq_kb_refs.q: How does Forcepoint differ from legacy DLP tools?
faq_kb_refs.a: >>> SCRAPE: Pull from competitive or 'why us' messaging

case_studies.title: >>> SCRAPE: Case study title from /customers or /case-studies
case_studies.result: >>> SCRAPE: Key metric / outcome — e.g. '60% reduction in data breach risk'

objections_playbook.objection: We already have a DLP solution.
objections_playbook.response: >>> SCRAPE: counter from competitive pages or sales materials
>>> SCRAPE: Pull stats from ROI calculator or analyst reports if linked on site

discovery_questions: >>> SCRAPE: Question 1 — typically from /contact-sales or demo booking forms
What is your current data security stack?
Are you subject to any compliance mandates (GDPR, HIPAA, FedRAMP)?
Have you experienced a recent security incident or audit finding?
How many employees / endpoints do you need to protect?

competitors_map.>>> SCRAPE: Competitor 1 name (e.g. Syma: >>> SCRAPE: key differentiator vs them from /compare pages

handoff_rules.user_msg_on_handoff: I'm connecting you with a Forcepoint security specialist who will be in touch shortly.

booking_link: >>> SCRAPE: URL of the 'Request a Demo' / 'Contact Sales' page
custom_prompt: >>> OPTIONAL: Any extra system prompt instructions specific to Forcepoint's sales motion (e.g. always push for a demo, never discuss pricing without qualification).
handoff_message: Thank you for your interest. A Forcepoint security expert will reach out to you within one business day.
